app.name: AURA Hotel
home.title: Home • AURA Hotel
home.hero_text: A globally-ready hotel booking experience with clear rooms, simple reservations, and thoughtful local preferences.
home.feature_simple_text: Search by style, room type, and comfort needs.
home.feature_secure_text: Sign in before reserving and manage each booking later.
home.feature_global_text: Language, direction, and locale formatting are prepared for scale.
home.empty_featured: No featured rooms match this search.
rooms.title: Rooms • AURA Hotel
rooms.heading: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Browse available stays and filter by name, type, or budget.
room_detail.title: Room details • AURA Hotel
room_detail.heading: Room details
booking.title: Booking • AURA Hotel
booking.heading: Create a booking
booking.subtitle: Choose a room, dates, and guest count. We will check availability before confirming.
booking.flow_step_1: Sign in or create an account
login.title: Sign in • AURA Hotel
login.heading: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Use your email, or the demo admin username.
signup.title: Sign up • AURA Hotel
signup.heading: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Set up a clear, localized profile before booking your stay.
signup.password_placeholder: At least 8 characters with letters and numbers
signup.password_help: Use 8+ characters with at least one letter and one number.
signup.terms_text: By creating an account, you agree to the terms and privacy notice for this demo booking experience.
signup.success_note: After sign-up, you’ll be sent to sign in. Replace the placeholder creation block with your production account API when ready.
reservations.title: Reservations • AURA Hotel
reservations.heading: Reservations
reservations.subtitle: Review upcoming and cancelled reservations.
reservations.search_label: Search by room name or type
dashboard.title: Dashboard • AURA Hotel
dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Reservations and test automation results.
dashboard.test_subtitle: Results generated automatically after running pytest.
dashboard.run_tests: Run tests once to see results here:
flash.max_price_number: Max price must be a number.
flash.max_price_positive: Max price must be zero or more.
flash.signup_required: Please complete all required sign-up fields.
flash.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
flash.password_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include letters and numbers.
flash.email_exists: An account with this email already exists.
flash.account_created: Account created! You can now login.
flash.booking_required: Please select a room and dates.
flash.checkin_future: Check-in must be today or later.
flash.room_conflict: This room is already booked for the selected dates.
settings.title: Settings • AURA Hotel
settings.heading: Preferences
settings.subtitle: Customize your experience with regional formatting and themes.
room.desc.cairo_comfort: A quiet minimalist single room, perfect for solo travelers.
room.desc.nile_view: A bright double room with a relaxing city view.
room.desc.lux_suite: Premium suite with extra space and comfort for families.
room.desc.red_sea_royal: Ultimate luxury overlooking the Red Sea with premium amenities.
room.desc.aswan_ancient: A unique stay with ancient Egyptian inspired interior design.
room.desc.modern_minimalist: Sleek and stylish urban loft for the modern traveler.
room.desc.family_penthouse: Enormous space with multiple rooms for the whole family.
